feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Consume Calculation View in SAC from CAP project not working
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have a SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP) project in my BTP environment (trial), and I am trying to consume a calculated view from SAP Analytics Cloud (trial), I have created a connection and then when I try to select a data source in the modeler, the list is empty.

To create the CAP project I followed the following tutorials:

Create an SAP Cloud Application Programming Model Project for SAP HANA Cloud
https://youtu.be/8obCwGEx1-Q?si=ll6fWgvEqPluQa8i
https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/hana-cloud-cap-create-project.html

SAP Tech Bytes: CAP/HANA Tutorial Part 2 - Create Database Artifacts Using Core Data Services (CDS)
https://youtu.be/uS_vT-gHYMo?si=C4W1q7I6CLfHErHP
https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/hana-cloud-cap-create-database-cds.html

SAP Tech Bytes: CAP/HANA Tutorial Part 3 - Create a User Interface
https://youtu.be/6WY70LyLS1c?si=X0XuCNEtDW2o6sRe
https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/hana-cloud-cap-create-ui.html

SAP Tech Bytes: CAP/HANA Tutorial Part 4 - Add User Authentication
https://youtu.be/anvKQP8yOr4?si=rDy5ndYbe__6ZwHp
https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/hana-cloud-cap-add-authentication.html

SAP Tech Bytes: CAP/HANA Tutorial Part 5 - Create Calculation View and Expose via CAP
https://youtu.be/zKsx91qicwU?si=xC4rZUGZrGFI7mxE
https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/hana-cloud-cap-calc-view.html

Everything works fine, at the end of part 5 I verified that the view was created correctly (see images 1) and the service exposes the data correctly. After that I tried to consume the calculated view from SAC, following the tutorial Develop Calculation View in BAS and consume in SAC (https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/develop-calculation-view-in-bas-and-consume-in-sac/ba-p/13509188), starting from step 8. I created a connection, and then I tried to create a model but when I select the data source, it doesn't show anything (see image 2).


image 1

image 2

What can I be doing wrong?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Scope Deployment
entry.content:
How to create a connection from S/4HANA to SAC?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAC Planning Advanced Formula - Rolling 3 Months Summation
entry.content:
Hi All - I am wanting to create a data action that will calculate the rolling 3 months summation value.

In other words, a user will enter a date/month range, and then for each month of that range, a rolling 3 months value must be calculated (as per pic below).

I have successfully created formula measures (using the SMA function) and added to a story, but I am now needing to calculate and store the value in the model.  And unfortunately formula measures can't be referenced in the advanced formula.

I have tried using the FOREACH and PREVIOUS functions but am not getting the result right.

Can someone please assist with the required code?

Rgds

Anton

entry.title: Can we achieve two scrollbars in an SAC table one for dimension and another for measures in freeze
entry.content:
Can we achieve two scrollbars in an SAC table one for dimension and another for measures when we use freeze in table column. This option is available in Lumira Dashboards but couldn't find in SAC table.

Attached the screenshot of Lumira dashboard table for reference (Two scrollbars are marked).

Any help in this topic is appreciated.

entry.title: SAC Mobile Cannot Find Model Information Error
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
We have prepared a special version for mobile so that our users can view an existing report on mobile. The data source for some of these reports comes from Datasphere, while the model for another is Import Model.
Import Model reports open smoothly on mobile. However, reports running with Datasphere sometimes say "Model information cannot be found." It gets an error like this and users cannot view the report.
We thought that the problem was related to authorization, but the same problem is experienced by the user with Admin privilege. My own device is Android and it may ask for a certificate when connected to Datasphere while opening a report. I do not encounter any problems when I proceed without selecting a certificate. Other users trying to access the report have iOS devices. I think the operating system difference may also cause the problem.
I would appreciate it if you could help me with a solution to this situation.

entry.title: How to Rank by measure so it only ranking the leaves measures
entry.content:
I want to rank on "This Year Account Base Growth"  but in the table below as shown it is ranking all members where I only want it to rank the leaves 

@N1kh1l 

 

Thanks 

Peers

entry.title: SAC Analytic Application: Table calculation
entry.content:
Hi Team Members,

I am working on SAC analytic application and facing some roadblocks to achieve some results related to Tabel widget.

Need some help/Guidance to achieve the output as marked in Red box in the image below

Model Type: Datasphere Analytic Model based on Live Hana Connection

( Remote table -> Fact View -> Analytical Model -> Analytic Application)

Dimensions involved: Week , Plant No.

Measures Involved: Qty A, Qty B

Required calcultions: 1.Total , 2.Weekly Difference and  3.Other Calculation

Calculation Definitions:

1.Total: It is the sum total of Qty A for all plants 1 to 6 for each week. Although this result is achieved by selecting option Show totals on Plant No dimension but i want it to be calculated it explicitly.

2.Weekly Difference :  As marked in the red box, it is the difference between week (i )- Week ( i-1) total, 

The thing here to be noted here is that Although we do not need Week 1 total in our final display, but it would be used to calculate the value of Cell B11.(i.e., Week 2 Weekly Difference)

3.Other Calcultion: In this calculation we would need two measure Qty A and Qty B , where we are not displaying Qty B anywhere in the story, but we need that in the calculation (see attached image).

The calculation is to be only calculated for the most recent Week(here Week 4) 

Please help me to achieve these results .

Thanks in advance.

Regards,
Krishn Kant

entry.title: Importing View/Tables from Datasphere to SAC And create a Model in SAC
entry.content: can we import the Datasphere View / tables to SAC and create a model in SAC with live connection? if yes, can we export daily delta datasets to the file server in a flat file format (CSV or XLS format)?

entry.title: Disabling widget full-screen mode when clicking on the widget in SAP ANALYTICS CLOUD
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm working on a mobile story in SAP ANALYTICS CLOUD and I would like to know if it is possible to disable a widget to go in full-screen mode when clicking on it.

I created a table with a script for the "onSelect" event. I would like to execute the script when clicking on a value. But right now, after clicking a value, the table goes fullscreen, then i have to click again the value and then closing the fullscreen mode.

Is there a way to disable the full-screen mode for a widget on mobile app ?

 

Thanks for helping me

entry.title: SAC Model defined threshold with bw live query models, how?
entry.content:
Dear Community,

Is it possible to create Model defined Threshold that could be applied to multiple measures within that Model?

Optimized Story Experience + BW Live Query Model (Planning)

Many thanks!

Attila

SAP Analytics Cloud SAP Analytics Cloud for planning

entry.title: Need to reduce the gap between bars of Bar chart in Story
entry.content: I have story of type classic , wanted to reduce the gap between each bar. Is there anyway its possible in old story or classic designed story? or bar should be side by side with no gap..Any tweeks if directly not possible

entry.title: Changing Live data source from SAP Datasphere to the new model in SAC Story with the same measures?
entry.content:
Within the SAP Datasphere environment, we duplicate the analytics model but connect it to a different SAP S/4 environment.

  • Model A connect to SAP S/4 DEV
  • Model B connect SAP S/4 QAS

In SAC, we intend to duplicate two stories while maintaining the same settings (Measure):

  • Story A currently connects to Model A.

So We duplicated Story A to create Story B and We replaced Model A with Model B in Story B. However the old settings to disappear.

Could you please suggest us, we have a lot of calculatation measures so we prefer not to recreate the story B from the template?

entry.title: How to switch on/off Unbooked Data with script?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
We prepared a report at SAC. People using the report want to see Unbooked Data by default in this report. However, they want to be able to turn it off and on whenever they want.
For this, we activated the Unbooked Data feature of the relevant dimension in Edit Mode. We asked users to disable Zeros in Tables and Nulls in Tables from active to passive in the Quick Menu in View Mode. However, when they did this, we saw that Unbooked Data was turned off, and when we activated it again, Unbooked Data did not open.
We looked to see if we could turn on/off unbooked data by creating a button for this and writing a script inside it, but we couldn't find it.
If you have a solution suggestion, I would be happy if you share it.

entry.title: Export SAC table to SFTP server
entry.content:
Dear experts,
I want to create a sftp export connection to enable users to send exported tables direclty to an SFTP server? We have BTP and integration suite but i cannot find where to activate open connectors. Once the connection created in SAC, can the export be triggered in a story?  

Did anyone succeed to do the same?

 

 

Regards,

SAP BTP, ABAP environment  SAP Analytics Cloud, hybrid analytics SAP Integration Suite

entry.title: SAC Live Connection Dynamic Text Date/Time - Date not showing correctly
entry.content:
Hello All,

Please could someone explain where the Story option of Dynamic Text - Model > Last Refreshed Date Time gets the Date (and Time from)?

I found this on our Community but doens't help (only confirm Time doesn't work).

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/last-refresh-date-and-time-dynamic-text-does-not-show-correct-result-in-sac/qaq-p/12731821

There are also these Customer Influence requests:

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/219791/?section=sectionComments

and

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/311872/?section=sectionDetails

Issue:

We currently have the Dynamic Text - Model > Last Refreshed Date Time returning a value of "May 13 2024 00:00" - today's date/

I understand from the detail in the links above that SAC cannot get the Time. OK that is fine as a target fix for that seems to be end of 2024, but the Date puzzles us as we cannot work out where "May 13" is being pulled from.

Story is based on a Live Connection. So looking at the underlying ADSOs (ADSO x2  on a HCPR with Left Outer Join) these have not been updated since "May 3" (this is Dev so process chains aren't running).

Analysis for Office correctly shows the last refesh date and time. 

Screenshots are attached. All Load Requests int he underlying ADSO's with the latest load being the 3rd May in ADSO 1 and the latest in ADSO 2 the 24th April with the 3rd My deleted. Then the same Query feeding SAC opened in AfO with Date and Time showing correctly based on the underlying ADSOs. Finally, SAC showing today's date and time of 00:00.

Thanks,

Nick.

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud Private Options - Memory impact on Performance
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I discovered that there are multiple client versions related to available memory for the SAC tenant. Check out the following link:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/5f61b6509a5e4d499e8cb9685f32db73.html 

 

This leads me to believe that SAC performance (such as opening stories and planning) is significantly influenced by memory and bandwidth. Since we are currently experiencing performance issues despite optimization efforts, could increasing memory and bandwidth be a viable solution?

Does SAP provide an option to increase the aforementioned parameters for testing purposes?

Kind regards,

Ismail

entry.title: Is there is a way to bring data from Employee Central Payroll into SAC by SAC provided connection?
entry.content:
Hello SAC experts,

 

I am trying to get the payroll data from Employee Central payroll into SAC model.

Is there a way to get this done using the standard connection provided by SAC?

Connection name: "SAP SuccessFactors"

When I use the above mention connection, I can see the two queries available in SAC, which are:

1. Employee Payroll Run Results

2. Employee Payroll Run Results Items

 

However, when imported, these qieries dont fetch any records.

Please suggest.

 

Best regards,

Umesh Jethwani

entry.title: Story will not load
entry.content:
Story will not open, just shows this screen for hours...

Started after a minor change to a singular chart, now won't open in either view or edit mode.

entry.title: Field level information (meta data) from People Analytics reports? Canvas or Stories?
entry.content:
Hi, have you found a way to extract field level information from SF reports? Canvas or Stories?

We are trying to do an overhaul of our reporting strategy and trying to reduce our reports catalog to a minimum and promote self service. But we have 1000s of reports that are being used today and would like to create a field catalog of reports to try and merge reports, eliminate reports etc., Have you found an easy way to run an integration center service or another report to get field level information from reports in SF?

entry.title: Variables are greyed for the Story out when using the API openPromptDialog()
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I have story based on two live BW Queries.

When using the API Widget.getDataSource().openPromptDialog(); on a text field.onClick, on execution, the variable prompt opens up, but  the user cannot change any variable for the story, as Variables are greyed out, like this:

He may only change variables for a chart. I want the user to open prompt, be able to change variables for the story with this click on a text field, and not change variables using the menu { } icon.

Is there any way to achieve this? Maybe some options? I tried a few things there, to no avail, but I may have missed something.

Thanks for your help!

Stéphane
